series_metadata.series_description: All documents and electronic systems (Old CE Legal- Duryee, Old CE Legal- Covington, New CE Legal and Next CE Legal) related to (Continuing Education) tracking and administrative actions. (paper/electronic)

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain 5 years after end of compliance period, the destroy. ; Electronic: Retain 5 years after end of compliance period, the destroy., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Erase
